title: Collection items
description: One article's membership in a collection — the join row linking an article to a collection, with an optional curator note and sort position.

collectionId.description: the collection this membership belongs to

articleId.description: the article filed into the collection

note.description: optional curator note explaining why this article was added

position.description: display order within the collection; lower = higher up

addedAt.description: when the article was added to the collection

collection.description: the collection this membership is filed under
